generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired Air Force colonel who's spent 30 years in civil defense planning, I'll tell you this: the current push for universal emergency preparedness kits is just fearmongering. Our communities already have robust emergency response systems - this is just another way to drain your wallet while making you think you're 'doing your part'. Trust the professionals who've kept us safe for decades. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
